assertionResults.title: returns correct gateway for mutate operation

assertionResults.title: returns correct gateway for query operation

assertionResults.fullName: describeOperation() returns description verbatim
assertionResults.title: returns description verbatim

assertionResults.fullName: describeOperation() tasks.add: falls back to static params table when def.params is absent
assertionResults.title: tasks.add: falls back to static params table when def.params is absent

assertionResults.title: tasks.add: params include title, parent, priority, type, size, description, acceptance

assertionResults.title: tasks.add: priority param has enum [low, medium, high, critical]

assertionResults.title: tasks.add: title param is required

assertionResults.title: tasks.add: parent param is optional

assertionResults.title: uses registry params when present (tasks.list)

assertionResults.fullName: describeOperation() strips hidden params from output
assertionResults.title: strips hidden params from output

assertionResults.fullName: describeOperation() preserves enum on status param from registry
assertionResults.title: preserves enum on status param from registry

assertionResults.title: includes gates by default (includeGates=true)
